command: fastp --detect_adapter_for_pe -i 2141517_S8_L001_R1_001.fastq.gz -I 2141517_S8_L001_R2_001.fastq.gz -o fastp/SRR38121698_fastp_R1.fastq.gz -O fastp/SRR38121698_fastp_R2.fastq.gz --unpaired1 SRR38121698_1U.fastq.gz --unpaired2 SRR38121698_2U.fastq.gz --detect_adapter_for_pe -g -5 20 -3 20 --length_required 50 -h fastp/SRR38121698_fastp.html -j fastp/SRR38121698_fastp.json
